title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: Zoro and the other fighters are pulled into separate battles as Upper Yard becomes a maze of enemies.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Zoro, Gan Fall. Zoro and the other fighters are pulled into separate battles as Upper Yard becomes a maze of enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: It has nothing to do with you.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: But you wanted to eliminate me...

summary: Zoro and the other fighters are pulled into separate battles as Upper Yard becomes a maze of enemies.
